name: Round Ceramic Vase Yellow - Room Essentials™
description:
Liven up your home aesthetic with this Round Ceramic Vase from Room Essentials™. Made of ceramic, this yellow vase is designed in a round shape to add an elegant touch to your decor. Plus, the watertight construction means you can fill the vase with fresh stems if desired to add natural beauty to any room.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
